notes: 007-multi-target-failover T050 — single-target hot-path baseline for v0.7.0. Captured via `cargo bench -p forward-client --bench data_plane -- --quick`. Structural guarantee: single-target rules dispatch through `forwarder::run`'s `if !rule.targets.is_empty()` branch BEFORE entering any failover code path; the target-zero `failover.rs` / `failover_path.rs` / `probe.rs` modules are unreachable for single-target rules at runtime (Constitution Principle II byte-identity). Numbers below are within noise vs the v0.1.0 baseline (≤ ~2% drift in `--quick` mode); a full multi-iteration run is recommended before each release tag.
